evidenceBoundary.summary: This trace records observable repository work, files affected, implementation decisions, pivots, validation evidence and residual risks.

precedenceDecisions: GitHub bundle governed branch, PR, CI and repository safety.
ResearchOps Developer Control governed platform architecture and route-state tests.
GOV.UK Design System governed UI, content, accessibility and component choice.
Multi-Functional Team roles informed interaction design, content design, IA and service-design decisions.
Cloudflare governed Worker, D1 and preview deployment behaviour.

workSummary.originalTask: Create account registration so users can request an account without assigning themselves a role.
workSummary.expandedScopeReason: Registration, role assignment, account display and preview deployment shared the same account context and access-control model.
workSummary.finalModel: Users can belong to multiple teams and hold team-scoped roles. Team Admin in ResearchOps Core Team is the global administration exception.

majorDecisions.decision: Registration creates a pending request for Team Admin review and does not assign roles directly.
majorDecisions.reason: Users should not self-grant access. The request only informs the reviewer.

majorDecisions.decision: Use GOV.UK-style request, review and check-answers language with user-facing validation errors.
majorDecisions.reason: Avoid exposing implementation details and avoid implying access has been granted.

majorDecisions.decision: Redirect signed-in users from account registration to the account dashboard.
majorDecisions.reason: The registration journey is for users who do not already have a signed-in ResearchOps account.

majorDecisions.decision: Role assignment requires a selected team or an explicitly created new team.
majorDecisions.reason: Assignments must not silently default to ResearchOps Core Team.

majorDecisions.decision: Do not add scenario-specific role catalogue entries for example roles such as User Researcher or Note-taker.
majorDecisions.reason: The requested model was team-scoped roles and privileges, not hard-coded scenario examples.
The account dashboard must show all team memberships and roles, not only a single active-team summary.

majorDecisions.decision: Recover display memberships from active team-scoped role assignments where membership rows are missing.
majorDecisions.reason: Preview data contained active permissions but the membership display was empty.

majorDecisions.decision: Deploy preview Workers for fix/** branches.
majorDecisions.reason: Backend fixes were passing CI but not deploying from the PR branch class.

majorDecisions.decision: Replace the team-role-permissions table with adaptive summary-card and list presentation.
majorDecisions.reason: Single-team, multi-team and ResearchOps Core Team Admin accounts need different levels of UI complexity.

knownFailuresAddressed: Registration send request failed in preview because API routing was incomplete.
Check answers change links did not allow answer changes.
Check answers container received inappropriate focus styling.
Preview Worker deployment did not run on fix/** branches.
Route-state test expected only main and feature/** deploy branches after fix/** was added.
Account dashboard showed no memberships when preview data had active role assignments but missing membership rows.
Account dashboard used an unsuitable table design once membership data appeared.
notRunLocally: Full local npm test suite was not run through this chat tool path.
Direct preview D1 SQL inspection was not available through the connected tools in this chat.

issuesAndPivots.issue: Backend changes were not visible in preview.
issuesAndPivots.pivot: Identified Worker deploy workflow branch filters and added fix/**.

issuesAndPivots.issue: Account dashboard had active permissions but no visible team memberships.
issuesAndPivots.pivot: Recovered membership display from active team-scoped role assignments as well as membership rows.

issuesAndPivots.issue: Table-based dashboard was visually poor after data was fixed.
issuesAndPivots.pivot: Changed presentation to adaptive summary-card and list patterns.

issuesAndPivots.issue: Product notes and trace records lagged behind implementation.
issuesAndPivots.pivot: Backfilled product decision files, RECENT_LEARNINGS.md and agent audit trace artefacts.

residualRisks: Current permissions may still be too detailed for ordinary users and may need further content design review.
The dashboard does not yet provide a first-class team-switching interaction for multi-team users.
Membership recovery improves display resilience but database writes should still be monitored for integrity.
The latest adaptive dashboard should be reviewed visually in preview after the cache-bust asset deploys.
followUpRecommendations: Test the dashboard with one ordinary team, multiple ordinary teams and ResearchOps Core Team Admin states.
Consider hiding or simplifying Current permissions for non-admin users.
Add a team-context selection journey if multi-team users need to switch working context.
Keep product notes and traces updated continuously on future long-running branches.
